description:
Batch 4/5 — Lifecycle Management (2 of 2)

Ensure backward compatibility of existing CLI flags with the new pool model:

- --max-tasks-per-tick: map to pool_size (alias, with deprecation notice in help text). New canonical flag: --pool-size / --max-agents
- --interval-secs: now controls housekeeping timer interval only (agent scheduling is reactive). Update help text.
- AO_MAX_AGENTS env var: sets pool_size, takes precedence over --max-tasks-per-tick
- --auto-run-ready: when true, work queue auto-discovers ready tasks. When false, only manually-started workflows execute.
- --once: run one housekeeping cycle + fill pool + drain pool + exit (preserves test behavior)

Update DaemonStartArgs, DaemonRunArgs, and the MCP DaemonStartInput to reflect the new semantics while keeping old flags functional. Add --pool-size as the preferred flag.
title: Map existing CLI flags to pool model and update daemon start
